PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Apr-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Espey (Counsel for Eileen Rodman, Petitioner); James Madow (Counsel for Joan Rodman, Objector).

Counsel briefly discussed the need for a special administrator with the Court concluding that the same was not necessary at this time but could be pursued ex parte should the need arise. After further discussion concerning the status and progress of the case, the Court referred the matter to the Presiding Judge for trial setting, signing the Order for same in open court. The matter was continued to April 30, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status.

Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katie Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Jimmy Peralta; Court Examiner: None; Court Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for contestant. David Hellman appearing for petitioner. Both counsel agree to be referred to mediation. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 11/6. All matters are continued to 11/13. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath.
